title: Reduce Client Churn
content_md:
# Reduce Client Churn

- Code: 37395b16
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=37395b16d10e4fc3aa2176bbf62805b6
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/e5f0774aa14b4048b6a46287743959ec?sid=04f109d0-1ad3-4903-a8b5-a45aacbda784?hide_owner=true&hide_share=true&hide_title=true&hideEmbedTopBar=true
- Duration: 5m 28s
- Resources:
  - [Done-For-You SEO Services](https://icecreamtruck.shop/)

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: All right, so let's talk about reducing client churn
This is a common issue that we run into pretty often new SEO clients are difficult to make happy
You're charging a thousand dollars a month
$1500 a month $2,000 a month for three to six months with out providing them any leads because SEO often takes time
Maybe some of the earlier quick wins have been able to allow you to provide some leads to them and they're happier
But in case not maybe the brand new they don't have a website
Then that's what this is that's what this lesson is going to be about and the assumption here is that yes
You made it clear to the client that it's going to take three to six months the client agreed to that timeline
But after a month or two of paying you without getting any leads without getting any calls
They're probably going to leave
Now in my experience if a client sticks around for six months that usually means they're going to stick around for years
So a real goal here is to get them to the six month mark at which point they should be getting calls regularly now
One obvious method you could switch billing to be on a per lead basis
Then they'd be much less likely to lead leave the downside of that of course is that
You would be cash flow negative because they're not getting any leads
So you're not getting any money, but you still have to spend time energy money on trying to get them to rank
So instead of that approach one idea to get them calls is to simply run ads
Depending on their space either Facebook ads or Google ads can be a good fit
Something like Google ads I ran this for a lot of plumbers and we got to the point
We could reliably generate water heater replacement leads for between two and three hundred dollars depending on the city that they're in
The client makes a thousand dollars in profit. So, you know 5x is a pretty good
For running Google ads, but the challenge here is
It's of course can be quite difficult for you to manage how to do SEO and run ads
You have fifteen hundred dollars a month, maybe two thousand dollars a month. So if you're
Spending two hundred dollars per lead and giving them five leads a month. That's a thousand dollars in just ad spend
So the goal would be to reduce ad spend as their number of calls go up
So that your profit margin raises over time the downside of course is short-term profits would be much much lower
Because of course of the ad spend and you're still trying to do SEO
But as long as you stay casual positive the goal is those long-term profits once you get them ranked
Once you get them getting calls without having to spend ads
So that's one way to get them calls immediately just to run some ads another really good way
We've done this in the past also is to reactivate your clients old customer list now a lot of local businesses
Don't really reach out to old customers ever a lot of them won't even have a list of customers
So ask them for their list if they don't have one then ask them for whatever they do have do they have email addresses
They have phone numbers can they go through their text history and just give you the information of prior customers they've had
right
So the focus there is of course going to be on
reactivating that list to provide
Revenue for your client. So we have a prompt
To help you think of ways to generate additional revenue. So if we run this for let's say roofing
Then what Claude is going to do is give us a
Few ideas on how to generate some additional revenue with an old customer list for a roofers
We have the seasonal inspection the emergency preparedness campaign property value protection
I so there's some pretty good ideas that it's coming up with here
You can ask it for more ideas obviously change it to be your specific industry
But the goal there is to get a good offer that you can send out to their old customers
That will help them generate revenue immediately
It'll get them, you know a fair number of calls if they're good and have a trustworthy customer list
So in addition to those couple of methods to get them these quick
Calls to get them clients to get them more customers faster
The other thing that I'm including down below is to maintain frequent communication with a brand new client
You don't want to have them pay you and then the next time they hear from you is a month later, right?
Then they spend a whole month not hearing from you wondering where their money is going wondering what you're doing
So what I put down below is a schedule
For the communications that you should be having with a brand new client, right?
Our focus here where we're not going to go more than a week without scheduling a meeting with them and
And especially in the first week we have two meetings. I wish I have three meetings in that first week
So this is just basically
Constantly trying to meet with them. These are short 15 20-minute meetings where you're giving them update
Here's what we're working on here's what we're going to be working on here's something that we should review
Here's something that we should review and the way this is structured is a lot of these
Especially the early meetings you can accomplish the work required for them with a simple prompt
That you can find in the other sections of this course
Hopefully that was helpful gave you some insights on how to reduce early client churn

summary: This lesson discusses strategies to reduce client churn in SEO by maintaining frequent communication and providing quick wins through ads or reactivating old customer lists. The goal is to keep clients engaged until they start seeing results.
key_points: Maintain frequent communication with new clients
Use ads to generate leads quickly
Reactivate old customer lists for immediate revenue
Provide regular updates and meet frequently in the first month
